title: PUBLIC WORKS COMMITTEE REPORT relative to requesting an ordinance to reinstate Ordinance No. 187,106, adding Section 62.104.1 of Article 2 of Chapter VI of the Los Angeles Municipal Code (LAMC) for reconsideration regarding the Sidewalk Repair Program.

appearances.section: Items for which Public Hearings Have Been Held
appearances.recommendation: REQUEST the City Attorney to prepare and present an ordinance to reinstate Ordinance No. 187,106, adding Section 62.104.1 of Article 2 of Chapter VI of the LAMC for reconsideration. Fiscal Impact Statement: None submitted by the Board of Public Works. Neither the City Administrative Officer nor the Chief Legislative Analyst has completed a financial analysis of this report. Community Impact Statement: None submitted (Energy and Environment Committee waived consideration of the above matter) Report from Public Works Committee_10-22-25 Report from Board of Public Works dated 5-22-25

attachments.text: Report from Board of Public Works dated 5-22-25
